title: ptilotus indivisus
intro: Ptilotus indivisus, also known as Swan River Knife Flower, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ptilotus indivisus include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Ptilotus indivisus can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although more research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
